docket_entries.description: WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT GUERRA, RAFAEL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CAMPOS, ROGER AS TO DEFENDANT GUERRA, RAFAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-01-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GUERRA, RAFAEL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2010 - JUDGMENT.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMPOS, ROGER AS TO DEFENDANT GUERRA, RAFAEL
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $163.03 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT GUERRA, RAFAEL
COPYING FEES (3 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CAMPOS, ROGER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-17-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-17-0210 BY COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY PLAINTIFF.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAMPOS, ROGER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUERRA, RAFAEL $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $783.64 INTEREST, $226.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,010.14, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED. SENT TO DEFENDANT.
